description: Comprehensive mathematical identity catalog for GNOSTICA verification

identities.name: Product Rule
conditions: f, g are functions of x

identities.name: Implicit Chain
identities.rhs: D[f, g[h[x]]] * D[g, h[x]] * D[h[x], x]

identities.name: Sum of Limits
identities.rhs: Limit[f, x -> a] + Limit[g, x -> a]

identities.name: Product of Limits
identities.rhs: Limit[f, x -> a] * Limit[g, x -> a]

identities.name: Quotient of Limits
identities.rhs: Limit[f, x -> a] / Limit[g, x -> a]

identities.name: Bezout Identity
identities.rhs: a*s + b*t (for some integers s, t)
